question: Will 1 Euro be worth less than 1 US Dollar before 2026?
resolution_criteria: This question will resolve as **Yes** if, at any time between 1 January 2024 and 1 January 2026, the EUR/USD exchange rate as [reported by Google Finance](https://www.google.com/finance/quote/EUR-USD) is less than `1.0000`.
background: After reaching its maximum of `1.5852` in July 2008 the EUR/USD exchange rate has significantly declined over the years. In September-October 2022 there was a brief period when the price of 1 EUR was less than 1 USD. Since then, the Euro price recovered slightly and reached an exchange rate of `1.1038` US dollar on 01.01.2024.
